message:
feat(widgets): inspector, modal system, and widget enhancements

New widgets:
- inspector.rs: Widget inspector for debugging and development (+295 lines)
- help_index.rs: Help indexing widget for contextual help
- history_panel.rs: History panel for command/action history
- keyboard_drag.rs: Keyboard-based drag interaction support

Modal system expansion:
- modal/mod.rs: Core modal functionality updates
- modal/animation.rs: Modal animation system
- modal/dialog.rs: Dialog modal variants (alert, confirm, prompt)
- modal/focus_integration.rs: Focus trap and restoration
- modal/stack.rs: Modal stacking with z-order management

Widget enhancements:
- table.rs: Table widget improvements (+205 lines)
- tree.rs: Tree widget enhancements (+182 lines)
- virtualized.rs: Virtualized list improvements (+76 lines)
- textarea.rs: Text area enhancements

lib.rs:
- Updated exports for new widgets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
